agent.name: performance-cost-auditor
agent.role: Re-audit f-203ecae0: Turbopack NFT / server trace after onboarding and next.config changes.

findings.title: Next.js NFT tracing warns that the whole monorepo may be pulled into the server trace
findings.description: Prior issue: Turbopack logged 'Encountered unexpected file in NFT list' with traces through next.config, onboarding fs helpers, and API routes. Re-audit after fix: dashboard preflight build output contains no NFT-list warnings; monorepo tracing root uses turbopackIgnore on process.cwd(); repo scan paths use joinUnderRepo (turbopackIgnore on base); snapshot module is not re-exported from onboarding.ts; PATCH onboarding uses onboarding-update.ts without pulling the full scanner graph.

proof_hooks.summary: audits/artifacts/_run_/build.txt — grep finds no 'Encountered unexpected file in NFT list' or 'Turbopack build encountered' warnings after preflight (perf-20260410-021430).
next.config.ts: monorepoRoot via path.join(/* turbopackIgnore: true */ process.cwd(), '..', '..') with matching outputFileTracingRoot and turbopack.root.
onboarding.ts: joinUnderRepo wraps path joins for scanned repo paths with turbopackIgnore.

history.notes: Re-audit (f-203ecae0): preflight build clean of NFT warnings; code matches intended trace-narrowing pattern.

next_actions.action: None for f-203ecae0 — synthesizer should remove from open_findings.
